name: Adaptability
desc: Powers up moves of the same type.

name: Aerilate
desc: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves.

name: Aftermath
desc: Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.

name: Analytic
desc: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves last.

name: Anger Point
desc: Raises Attack upon taking a critical hit.

name: Anticipation
desc: Senses the foe’s dangerous moves.

name: Armor Tail
desc: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

name: Aroma Veil
desc: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.

name: Battle Bond
desc: Defeating an opposing Pokémon strengthens the Pokémon’s bond with its Trainer, and it becomes Ash-Greninja. Water Shuriken gets more powerful.

name: Berserk
desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when it takes a  hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

name: Big Pecks
desc: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.

name: Blaze
desc: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

name: Bulletproof
desc: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.

name: Cheek Pouch
desc: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.

name: Chlorophyll
desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in sunshine.

name: Clear Body
desc: Prevents ability reduction.

name: Cloud Nine
desc: Negates weather effects.

name: Competitive
desc: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

name: Compound Eyes
desc: Raises accuracy.

name: Contrary
desc: Makes stat changes have an opposite effect.

name: Corrosion
desc: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it’s a Steel or Poison type.

name: Cud Chew
desc: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

name: Curious Medicine
desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

name: Cursed Body
desc: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.

name: Cute Charm
desc: Infatuates on contact.

name: Damp
desc: Prevents self-destruction.

name: Defiant
desc: When its stats are lowered its Attack increases.

name: Disguise
desc: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.

name: Dragonize
desc: Transforms Normal-type moves into Dragon-type and boosts their power by 20%.

name: Drizzle
desc: Summons rain in battle.

name: Drought
desc: Summons sunlight in battle.

name: Dry Skin
desc: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.

name: Early Bird
desc: Awakens quickly from sleep.

name: Earth Eater
desc: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

name: Electromorphosis
desc: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

name: Fairy Aura
desc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

name: Filter
desc: Powers down super­ effective moves.

name: Flame Body
desc: Burns the foe on contact.

name: Flash Fire
desc: Powers up if hit by fire.

name: Flower Veil
desc: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.

name: Forecast
desc: Changes with the weather.

name: Friend Guard
desc: Reduces damage done to allies.

name: Frisk
desc: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.

name: Fur Coat
desc: Halves damage from physical moves.

name: Gale Wings
desc: Gives priority to Flying-type moves.

name: Gluttony
desc: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.

name: Gooey
desc: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.

name: Guts
desc: Ups ATTACK if suffering.

name: Harvest
desc: May create another Berry after one is used.

name: Healer
desc: May heal an ally’s status conditions.

name: Heatproof
desc: Weakens the power of Fire-type moves.

name: Heavy Metal
desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s weight.

name: Hospitality
desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

name: Huge Power
desc: Raises ATTACK.

name: Hunger Switch
desc: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.

name: Hustle
desc: Trades accuracy for power.

name: Hydration
desc: Heals status problems if it is raining.

name: Hyper Cutter
desc: Prevents ATTACK reduction.

name: Ice Body
desc: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.

name: Illuminate
desc: Encounter rate increases.

name: Illusion
desc: Comes out disguised as the Pokémon in back.

name: Immunity
desc: Prevents poisoning.

name: Imposter
desc: It transforms itself into the Pokémon it is facing.

name: Infiltrator
desc: Passes through the foe’s barrier and strikes.

name: Innards Out
desc: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.

name: Inner Focus
desc: Prevents flinching.

name: Insomnia
desc: Prevents sleep.

name: Intimidate
desc: Lowers the foe’s ATTACK.

name: Iron Fist
desc: Boosts the power of punching moves.

name: Justified
desc: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.

name: Keen Eye
desc: Prevents loss of accuracy.

name: Klutz
desc: The Pokémon can’t use any held items.

name: Leaf Guard
desc: Prevents status problems in sunny weather.

name: Levitate
desc: Not hit by GROUND attacks.

name: Light Metal
desc: Halves the Pokémon’s weight.

name: Lightning Rod
desc: Draws electrical moves.

name: Limber
desc: Prevents paralysis.

name: Liquid Voice
desc: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

name: Long Reach
desc: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

name: Magic Bounce
desc: Reflects status- changing moves.

name: Magic Guard
desc: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.

name: Magician
desc: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.

name: Magma Armor
desc: Prevents freezing.

name: Marvel Scale
desc: Ups DEFENSE if suffering.

name: Mega Launcher
desc: Powers up aura and pulse moves.

name: Mega Sol
desc: Transforms Normal-type moves into Fire-type and boosts their power by 20%.

name: Merciless
desc: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

name: Mimicry
desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.

name: Minus
desc: Powers up with PLUS.

name: Mirror Armor
desc: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

name: Mold Breaker
desc: Moves can be used regardless of abilities.

name: Moody
desc: Raises one stat and lowers another.

name: Motor Drive
desc: Raises Speed if hit by an Electric-type move.

name: Moxie
desc: Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokémon.

name: Multiscale
desc: Reduces damage when HP is full.

name: Mummy
desc: Contact with this Pokémon spreads this Ability.

name: Natural Cure
desc: Heals upon switching out.

name: No Guard
desc: Ensures the Pokémon and its foe’s attacks land.

name: Oblivious
desc: Prevents attraction.

name: Opportunist
desc: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

name: Overcoat
desc: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather.

name: Overgrow
desc: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

name: Own Tempo
desc: Prevents confusion.

name: Parental Bond
desc: Parent and child attack together.

name: Pickpocket
desc: Steals an item when hit by another Pokémon.

name: Pickup
desc: May pick up items.

name: Piercing Drill
desc: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

name: Pixilate
desc: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves.

name: Plus
desc: Powers up with MINUS.

name: Poison Heal
desc: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.

name: Poison Point
desc: Poisons foe on contact.

name: Poison Touch
desc: May poison targets when a Pokémon makes contact.

name: Prankster
desc: Gives priority to a status move.

name: Pressure
desc: Raises foe’s PP usage.

name: Protean
desc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s using.

name: Pure Power
desc: Raises ATTACK.

name: Purifying Salt
desc: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

name: Queenly Majesty
desc: Its majesty pressures the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

name: Quick Draw
desc: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

name: Quick Feet
desc: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.

name: Rain Dish
desc: Slight HP recovery in rain.

name: Receiver
desc: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

name: Reckless
desc: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

name: Refrigerate
desc: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves.

name: Regenerator
desc: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.

name: Ripen
desc: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

name: Rivalry
desc: Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.

name: Rock Head
desc: Prevents recoil damage.

name: Rough Skin
desc: Hurts to touch.

name: Sand Force
desc: Boosts certain moves’ power in a sandstorm.

name: Sand Rush
desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in a sandstorm.

name: Sand Spit
desc: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

name: Sand Stream
desc: Summons a sandstorm.

name: Sand Veil
desc: Ups evasion in a sandstorm.

name: Sap Sipper
desc: Boosts Attack when hit by a Grass-type move.

name: Scrappy
desc: Enables moves to hit Ghost-type foes.

name: Screen Cleaner
desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

name: Shadow Tag
desc: Prevents the foe’s escape.

name: Sharpness
desc: Powers up slicing moves.

name: Shed Skin
desc: Heals the body by shedding.

name: Sheer Force
desc: Removes added effects to increase move damage.

name: Shell Armor
desc: Blocks critical hits.

name: Shield Dust
desc: Prevents added effects.

name: Skill Link
desc: Increases the frequency of multi-strike moves.

name: Slush Rush
desc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.

name: Sniper
desc: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.

name: Snow Cloak
desc: Raises evasion in a hailstorm.

name: Snow Warning
desc: The Pokémon summons a hailstorm in battle.

name: Solar Power
desc: Boosts Sp. Atk, but lowers HP in sunshine.

name: Solid Rock
desc: Powers down super­ effective moves.

name: Soundproof
desc: Avoids sound-based moves.

name: Speed Boost
desc: Gradually boosts SPEED.

name: Spicy Spray
desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

name: Stall
desc: The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.

name: Stalwart
desc: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

name: Stamina
desc: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.

name: Stance Change
desc: Changes form depending on how it battles.

name: Static
desc: Paralyzes on contact.

name: Steadfast
desc: Raises Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.

name: Stench
desc: Helps repel wild POKéMON.

name: Sticky Hold
desc: Prevents item theft.

name: Strong Jaw
desc: The Pokémon’s strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.

name: Sturdy
desc: Negates 1-hit KO attacks.

name: Super Luck
desc: Heightens the critical-hit ratios of moves.

name: Supersweet Syrup
desc: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

name: Supreme Overlord
desc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

name: Surge Surfer
desc: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

name: Swarm
desc: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

name: Sweet Veil
desc: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.

name: Swift Swim
desc: Raises SPEED in rain.

name: Symbiosis
desc: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.

name: Synchronize
desc: Passes on status problems.

name: Tangled Feet
desc: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.

name: Technician
desc: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.

name: Telepathy
desc: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

name: Thick Fat
desc: Heat-and-cold protection.

name: Torrent
desc: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

name: Tough Claws
desc: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

name: Toxic Debris
desc: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

name: Trace
desc: Copies special ability.

name: Unaware
desc: Ignores any change in ability by the foe.

name: Unburden
desc: Raises Speed if a held item is used.

name: Unnerve
desc: Makes the foe nervous and unable to eat Berries.

name: Unseen Fist
desc: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

name: Volt Absorb
desc: Turns electricity into HP.

name: Wandering Spirit
desc: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

name: Water Absorb
desc: Changes water into HP.

name: Water Bubble
desc: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.

name: Weak Armor
desc: Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.

name: White Smoke
desc: Prevents ability reduction.

name: Zero to Hero
desc: Transforms into Hero Form when switching out.
